description: BootstrapCDN is a public content delivery network that serves Bootstrap, Font Awesome, Bootswatch, Bootstrap Icons, and related frontend assets. It is operated under the jsDelivr organization and provides production CDN links for these libraries.
summary: BootstrapCDN exposes a public HTTP integration surface for retrieving CDN asset/version information; no authenticated developer APIs, GraphQL APIs, MCP servers, or CLIs were found.
